title: thymus polytrichus var. drucei
intro: Thymus polytrichus var. drucei, also known as Druce's thyme, is a variety of the Thymus polytrichus plant, belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Druce's thyme include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Druce's thyme is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, taking advantage of its medicinal properties to alleviate various health conditions.
